name: ComRat Registry Service Installation
notes: This rule triggers when a comrat service is installed and a payload is written into the registry. This could indicate an existing access such as compromised credentials or a previously installed backdoor.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed
when the event matches Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\System32\Tasks\Microsoft\Windows\Customer Experience Improvement Program\Consolidator
when the event matches Registry Key (custom) is any of HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SQMClient\Windows.WSqmCons
TD_list: APPLY ComRat Registry Service Installation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Successful Registry Modification, System.Service Installed
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) is any of C:\Windows\System32\Tasks\Microsoft\Windows\Customer Experience Improvement Program\Consolidator
AND when the event matches Registry Key (custom) is any of HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\SQMClient\Windows.WSqmCons
RED_list: Event name: ComRat Registry Service Installation

Event description: Detects when a comrat service is installed and a payload is written into the registry. This could indicate an existing access such as compromised credentials or a previously installed backdoor.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Registry Key (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
